signals.headline: **March 2026 inflation data:** Annual inflation rose to 3
signals.raw: **March 2026 inflation data:** Annual inflation rose to 3.3% in March 2026, the highest since May 2024[1], with core inflation at 2.6%[1]. This data was already released and is historical rather than breaking news.

signals.headline: **Federal Reserve stance:** The Fed held rates steady at 3
signals.raw: **Federal Reserve stance:** The Fed held rates steady at 3.50% to 3.75% at its March 18 meeting, with projections pointing to one rate cut in 2026[3]. This is past information from mid-March.
